description: Tasks that have exactly one workflow-type skill (流程型task with single SKILL)

tasks.summary: Workflow to analyze and resolve BGP oscillation and route leaks in Azure Virtual WAN hub-and-spoke topologies
steps: Step 1: Sanity-check inputs — verify all ASNs exist in topology, check relationship symmetry
Step 2: Detect BGP oscillation — build directed preference graph and find preference cycles
Step 3: Detect BGP route leak — check valley-free rule violations
Step 4: Select fix using tiered ranking — Tier 1: Virtual WAN Routing Intent, Tier 2: Export/Route Policy, Tier 3: UDR
Step 5: Reject prohibited fixes — reject disabling BGP, shutting down peering, removing connectivity

tasks.summary: Comprehensive citation management workflow for academic research
steps: Phase 1: Paper Discovery and Search — search Google Scholar and PubMed
Phase 2: Metadata Extraction — convert paper identifiers to complete metadata via APIs
Phase 3: BibTeX Formatting — generate clean, properly formatted BibTeX entries
Phase 4: Citation Validation — verify all citations are accurate and complete
Phase 5: Integration with Writing Workflow — build references for manuscripts

tasks.summary: Step-by-step workflow for detrending economic time series using HP filter
steps: Step 1: Load and clean data — handle missing values, ensure proper time ordering
Step 2: Convert to real terms — deflate nominal values using appropriate price index
Step 3: Apply log transformation — for positive level variables
Step 4: Apply HP filter — use appropriate lambda for data frequency
Step 5: Analyze cyclical component — compute correlations, volatilities, and business cycle statistics

tasks.summary: Multi-hop evidence search and structured entity extraction over enterprise artifact datasets
steps: Step 0: Parse intent and target product from the question
Step 1: Build candidate set with wide recall by searching product artifacts and following cross-references
Step 2: Apply hard product grounding (anti-distractor gate) requiring 2+ independent grounding signals
Step 3: Select the correct report version using latest/final/date precedence
Step 4: Extract author(s) from document fields, PR fields, or Slack messages
Step 5: Extract key reviewers using tiered evidence
Step 6: Validate IDs and de-duplicate, returning JSON-ready output with evidence map

tasks.summary: Spreadsheet workflow with financial modeling standards and mandatory recalculation
steps: Step 1: Choose tool (pandas for data, openpyxl for formulas/formatting)
Step 2: Create/Load workbook or existing file
Step 3: Modify — add/edit data, formulas, and formatting
Step 4: Save to file
Step 5: Recalculate formulas using recalc.py (mandatory if using formulas)
Step 6: Verify and fix any errors from recalc output

tasks.summary: Comprehensive data engineering skill with multiple workflows
steps: Workflow 1 (ETL Pipeline): (1) Design architecture, (2) Configure YAML pipeline, (3) Generate Airflow DAG, (4) Define data quality rules, (5) Deploy and monitor
Workflow 2 (Streaming Pipeline): (1) Select architecture, (2) Configure pipeline, (3) Generate Kafka configs, (4) Generate Flink/Spark job, (5) Deploy and monitor
Workflow 3 (Data Quality): (1) Define rules, (2) Run validation, (3) Review results, (4) Integrate CI/CD, (5) Monitor trends
Workflow 4 (Performance Optimization): (1) Profile pipeline, (2) Identify bottlenecks, (3) Apply optimizations, (4) Tune Spark jobs, (5) Measure impact

tasks.summary: Calibrate GLM parameters to minimize RMSE using manual and optimization approaches
steps: Step 1: Start with default parameters, run GLM, calculate RMSE
Step 2: Adjust one parameter at a time based on diagnostic pattern
Step 3: Apply specific parameter adjustments (wind_factor, Kw, coef_mix_hyp, etc.)
Step 4: Iterate until RMSE < 2.0C
Step 5: Use optimization (Nelder-Mead) for fine-tuning after manual adjustment

tasks.summary: Design step test excitation signals for system identification
steps: Step 1: Start at steady state at a known operating point
Step 2: Apply a step input (change input from zero to a constant value)
Step 3: Hold for sufficient duration (3-5 time constants recommended)
Step 4: Record the response at regular intervals

tasks.summary: Sequential pipeline for harmonizing clinical lab data
steps: Step 0: Filter incomplete records — remove rows with any missing values
Step 1: Parse numeric formats — handle scientific notation, European decimals, whitespace
Step 2: Unit conversion via range-based detection — try conversion factors until value falls in expected range
Step 3: Format output to exactly 2 decimal places

tasks.summary: Workflow for quantifying factor contributions using R-squared decomposition on PCA factor scores
steps: Step 1: Combine ALL variables into one matrix
Step 2: Standardize variables using StandardScaler
Step 3: Run ONE global PCA with varimax rotation on all variables together
Step 4: Calculate full model R-squared using factor scores
Step 5: Calculate contribution of each factor via R-squared decomposition

tasks.summary: 4-phase workflow for Lean 4 theorem proving with compiler-guided repair
steps: Phase 1: Structure Before Solving — outline proof strategy with have statements and documented sorries
Phase 2: Helper Lemmas First — build infrastructure bottom-up, extract reusable components
Phase 3: Incremental Filling — fill ONE sorry at a time, compile after each, commit working code
Phase 4: Type Class Management — add explicit instances with haveI/letI when synthesis fails

tasks.summary: Pipeline for normalizing manufacturing failure reason text into standardized codebook codes
steps: Step 1: Load test_center_logs.csv and product codebooks; build valid_code_set, station_scope_map
Step 2: For each record, split raw_reason_text into 1-N segments with segment_id and span_text
Step 3: For each segment, filter candidates by station scope, compute match score from combined evidence
Step 4: Rank candidates by score; apply deterministic tie-break among near-best candidates
Step 5: Output exactly one pred_code/pred_label per segment (or UNKNOWN) with calibrated confidence

tasks.summary: End-to-end pipeline for reflow profile compliance checking
steps: Step 1: Extract config object from handbook: regions, limits, windows, margins, feasibility rules
Step 2: Load and sort MES and thermocouple data by run_id, tc_id, time_s
Step 3: Compute per-run metrics deterministically with stable tie-breaks and interpolation
Step 4: Build JSON output objects with sorted IDs and 2-decimal rounding
Step 5: Run sanity checks: string IDs, sorted arrays, rounded floats, deterministic tie-breaks

tasks.summary: Pipeline for repairing infeasible FJSP schedules into feasible ones within policy budgets
steps: Step 1: Determine precedence-aware repair order: sort operations by (index, baseline start, base index)
Step 2: For each operation, compute anchor = max(baseline start, end of previous op of same job)
Step 3: List only allowed machines; if baseline machine is invalid, replace with feasible one
Step 4: For each candidate machine, scan forward from anchor to find earliest feasible start
Step 5: Choose option with smallest lexicographic score, respecting policy budgets
Step 6: Record the operation on the machine timeline in precedence-aware order

tasks.summary: Practical mastering steps for TTS audio in video dubbing
steps: Step 1: Choose a TTS engine and confirm native sample rate
Step 2: Apply speech cleanup per segment: rumble/DC removal, optional low-pass, boundary fades
Step 3: Measure loudness using ebur128, then apply loudnorm normalization (-23 LUFS / -1.5 dBTP)
Step 4: Handle timing and segment boundaries: pad short segments, speed-adjust long segments, apply fades

tasks.summary: Automated PDDL planning: load, plan, validate, and save
steps: Step 1: Load domain and problem PDDL files using load_problem()
Step 2: Generate a plan using generate_plan() with a classical planner
Step 3: Validate the plan using validate() to ensure goal satisfaction
Step 4: Save the plan to disk using save_plan()

tasks.summary: End-to-end pipeline for creating audiobooks from web content with TTS provider fallback
steps: Step 1: Fetch web content using curl and verify completeness
Step 2: Clean and prepare text for TTS (remove URLs, footnotes; chunk at sentence boundaries)
Step 3: TTS conversion with automatic provider fallback (ElevenLabs -> OpenAI -> gTTS), concatenate with ffmpeg

tasks.summary: PowerPoint creation, editing, and analysis with three distinct workflows
steps: Workflow A (new, no template): (1) Read html2pptx.md, (2) Create HTML slides, (3) Convert via html2pptx.js, (4) Visual validation and iterate
Workflow B (editing existing): (1) Read ooxml.md, (2) Unpack, (3) Edit XML, (4) Validate, (5) Pack
Workflow C (template-based): (1) Extract text/thumbnails, (2) Analyze template, (3) Create outline, (4) Rearrange slides, (5) Extract inventory, (6) Generate replacement JSON, (7) Apply replacements

tasks.summary: Solving finite-horizon LQR via backward Riccati recursion for MPC applications
steps: Step 1: Initialize P_N = Q (backward Riccati recursion starting point)
Step 2: Backward pass — compute gain K_k and cost P_k for k = N-1 down to 0
Step 3: Forward simulation — apply u_k = -K_k @ x_k starting from x_0
MPC application: (1) Measure current state, (2) Solve finite-horizon LQR, (3) Apply first control u_0, (4) Repeat

tasks.summary: Workflow to align Python version and install dependencies for NLP research code reproduction
steps: Step 1: Read the repo dependency files (environment.yml, requirements.txt)
Step 2: Log the current environment to /root/python_int.txt
Step 3: Compare requirements with current environment and set up matching Python using uv

tasks.summary: Workflow for running Trivy vulnerability scanner in offline mode
steps: Step 1: Verify the offline Trivy database exists at the expected cache path
Step 2: Construct the Trivy command with offline flags (--skip-db-update, --offline-scan, --cache-dir)
Step 3: Execute the scan and handle errors

tasks.summary: Workflow for running Suricata against PCAPs offline and iterating on rules
steps: Step 1: Run Suricata on a PCAP with offline flags (-r, -S, -l, -k none)
Step 2: Inspect alerts in eve.json using jq to count and view alert signatures
Step 3: Iterate: validate rule syntax, run on positive traffic, run on negative traffic

tasks.summary: 4-step pipeline to build a unified taxonomy from hierarchical product paths
steps: Step 1: Load, standardize, filter, and merge category paths from multiple sources
Step 2: Generate weighted embeddings with exponential decay weights per hierarchy level
Step 3: Recursive clustering with average linkage + cosine distance and intelligent naming
Step 4: Export results as unified taxonomy CSV files

tasks.summary: Workflow for Three.js scene graph parsing and per-link OBJ/URDF export
steps: Step 1: Load the module, call createScene(), then updateMatrixWorld(true)
Step 2: Treat named THREE.Group nodes as parts/links
Step 3: Assign each mesh to its nearest named ancestor
Step 4: Bake world transforms into geometry before export
Step 5: Export per-part OBJ (and optionally URDF) using deterministic ordering

tasks.summary: Workflow for Three.js scene graph parsing and per-link OBJ/URDF export
